zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke於大約1266年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可可斯斯時，他的父親Robert FitzRoger Clavering33歲，母親Baroness Margery La Zouche16歲。他與Hawise de Tibetot在英國哈普爾波斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1332年1月21日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾艾享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可明日香。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke于大约1266年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可可斯斯时，他的父亲Robert FitzRoger Clavering33岁，母亲Baroness Margery La Zouche16岁。他与Hawise de Tibetot在英国哈普爾波斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1332年1月21日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾艾享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可明日香。

nameMeanings.name: Clavering
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name; the Essex name is from Clavering (Essex), but in NE England it is probably from Clavering near Wooler (Northumb).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke was born about 1266, in Costessey, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, was 33 and his mother, Baroness Margery La Zouche, was 16. He married Hawise de Tibetot in Portchester, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 21 January 1332, in Aynhoe, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Langley, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke est né environ 1266, à Costessey, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Baroness Margery La Zouche, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de Tibetot à Portchester, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 21 janvier 1332, à Aynhoe, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Langley, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke um 1266 in Costessey, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzRoger Clavering 33 und seine Mutter Baroness Margery La Zouche 16. Er hat in Portchester, Hampshire, England Hawise de Tibetot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 21. Januar 1332 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Aynhoe, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Langley, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke è nato il circa 1266 nel Costessey, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Margery La Zouche, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Hawise de Tibetot nel Portchester, Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 gennaio 1332, nel Aynhoe, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Langley, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stokeが約1266年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクコステセイで生まれた時，父Robert FitzRoger Claveringは33歳，母Baroness Margery La Zoucheは16歳であった。イギリスハンプシュアイアポルトチェスターでHawise de Tibetotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年1月21日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアエインhオで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクラングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke(이)가 대략 1266년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 코스츠시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzRoger Clavering(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Margery La Zouche(은)는 16세였다. 그는 영국 함프실르 포트체스터에서 Hawise de Tibetot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 1월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 아이호에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 랭글리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke nasceu aproximadamente 1266, em Costessey, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Margery La Zouche, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise de Tibetot em Portchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1332, em Aynhoe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Langley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke родился около 1266 г. в местности костесси, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert FitzRoger Clavering было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Baroness Margery La Zouche, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de Tibetot в местности порчестир, хампшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 21 января 1332 г. в местности аино, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности лангли, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Clavering 2nd Ld of Stoke nació aproximadamente 1266, en Costessey, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert FitzRoger Clavering, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Baroness Margery La Zouche, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Hawise de Tibetot en Portchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de enero de 1332, en Aynhoe, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Langley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
